subject: PC slow after recent Windows update
description: After cumulative update, boot and login are much slower; disk light solid minutes.

ts_steps.title: Wait out maintenance
ts_steps.action: Leave plugged in for an hour on AC; Windows may be finishing indexing or update cleanup.

ts_steps.title: Storage sense and temp
ts_steps.action: Settings → System → Storage — run cleanup; remove old Windows Update files if offered.

ts_steps.title: Update rollback window
ts_steps.action: If within 10 days and critical: Settings → Windows Update → Update history — uninstall latest quality update as test.

internal_information: Driver regression or indexer. Event Viewer for disk errors. Escalate if rollback fixes — file bug with build number.
